details.IncidentDetail: "[14] [Notification] [CHP]-HILL ENTERPRISE CONT'ING // REQ CT FOR ASSISTANCE W/ CLEANUP // INVLD IS HAVING A DIFFERENT 1185 TOW THE TRLR"
